title: Top 24 Finalist - Arutmint Got Talent 2024
description: Selected as a top 24 finalist in the national business plan competition organized by Arutmint Got Talent 2024.

title: 2nd Place Winner - SPUT Convention 2024
description: Won 2nd place in the DT category at the SPUT Convention by PT Kalimantan Prima Persada. Developed 'Water Bender', an IoT-based water detection system equipped with alarms and a web dashboard for port monitoring.

title: Grantee - Program Dosen Wajib Meneliti (PDWM)
description: Selected for research funding by LPPM Universitas Lambung Mangkurat for the project titled 'Penerapan Algoritma Machine Learning pada Prediksi Komplikasi Infark Miokard Akut'.

title: Grantee - Program Dosen Wajib Pengabdian Kepada Masyarakat (PDWA)
description: Secured funding from LPPM Universitas Lambung Mangkurat for a community service project focusing on competency exam mentoring and presentation training for junior high school students in Banjarbaru.

title: Grantee & PIMNAS Finalist - PKM-K 2024
description: Passed the national funding program by the Ministry of Research and Technology and advanced to PIMNAS UNAIR 2024 with 'PinMe', a marker-based Augmented Reality application for 3D visualization on banners and posters.

title: Publication - IJEEEMI Journal
description: Published 'The Impactness of SMOTE as Imbalance Class Handling for Myocardial Infarction Complication Classification'. The study evaluates ML models and data imputation techniques, demonstrating that Iterative Imputation combined with SVM achieves 100% predictive accuracy.

title: Publication - JITEKI Journal
description: Published 'The Effectiveness of Data Imputations on Myocardial Infarction Complication Classification'. This research highlights the influence of data imputation and hyperparameter tuning (via Bayesian Optimization) on handling missing medical data, proving SVM's high efficacy.
